sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n111171" key="filoqh/c" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">φῐλο-θήξ</orth>, <foreign lang="greek" TEIform="foreign">θῆγος, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ὁ</gen>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">ἡ</gen>,</foreign> <sense id="n111171.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">often sharpened,</tr_> <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Theognost.</author> <title_ TEIform="title">Can.</title_> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">40</biblScope></bibl>.</sense> </entryFree>
